'''Jiroch-Saloch''', also known as '''Saloch''', was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Yushan sector/Legends|Yushan sector]]. At some point after receiving [[Technology level|galactic-level technology]], the [[Hunting/Legends|hunting]]-oriented [[Tunroth]] [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Colonist/Legends|colonized]] the planet. [[Spacer/Legends|Spacers]] referred to Jiroch-Saloch, together with the [[Jiroch system/Legends|Jiroch system's]] other worlds [[Jiroch-Reslia]] and [[Jiroch-Kalok]], as the [[Triumvirate (planets)|Triumvirate]]. A number of [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] also settled on the planet, leaving a strong influence on its architecture.

==Description==
Jiroch-Saloch,<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> also known as Saloch, was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that occupied the fifth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position in the [[Jiroch system/Legends|Jiroch system]],<ref name="GG12" /> located in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]]<ref name="TEA" /> [[Yushan sector/Legends|Yushan sector]]<ref name="Yushan" /> and connected via the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]] [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|hyperlane]] to the [[Dalisor system/Legends|Dalisor system]] and the<ref name="TEA" /> [[Bruanii sector/Legends|Bruanii sector's]]<ref name="TEA Companion">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> [[Quamar system/Legends|Quamar system]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was orbited by the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Saloch²]].<ref name="Fry" />

==History==
[[File:ReslianPurge-XWingRogueSquadron25.jpg|thumb|right|270px|A Tunroth colonist fights against a Lortan Fanatic on Jiroch-Saloch's moon, Saloch²]]
[[Millennium/Legends|Millennia]] prior to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Tunroth]] [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Colonist/Legends|colonized]] the Jiroch [[Star system/Legends|system]] planets Jiroch-Saloch and [[Jiroch-Kalok]] after they had become a member of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], in the process gaining access to [[Technology level|galactic-level technology]]<ref name="GG12" /> and developing [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] technology.<ref name="UAA" /> Jiroch-Saloch, together with Jiroch-Kalok and<ref name="GG12" /> the Tunroth [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]],<ref name="UAA" /> the Jiroch system's planet [[Jiroch-Reslia]], were often referred to by [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] as the [[Triumvirate (planets)|Triumvirate]] as a dedication to the [[Assemblage of Three]].<ref name="GG12" /> The Assemblage consisted of the three highest-level Tunroth [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]] governing Tunroth society,<ref name="UAA" /> who promoted Jiroch-Kalok and Jiroch-Saloch's simultaneous colonization.<ref name="GG12" /> Many [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] also settled on both worlds for a [[Time/Legends|time]] and strongly influenced the local architecture.<ref name="GMR" />

In [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]],<ref name="UAA" /> the expansionist [[Lortan Fanatics]] attacked the Jiroch system in the event named the [[Reslian Purge]].<ref name="GG12" /> The Tunroth were unable to repel them with their primitive technology, resulting in millions of Tunroth [[Death/Legends|casualties]]<ref name="UAA" /> and their population being reduced to four million. The fanatics were thwarted and further attacks were halted when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] intervened, after which reconstruction efforts took place on the three Jiroch system worlds<ref name="GG12" /> as well as the Tunroth colony on Jiroch-Saloch's moon Saloch².<ref name="XW25">[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 25|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 25]]</ref> The Tunroth [[New Republic pilot/Legends|New Republic pilot]] [[Xarcce Huwla]] hailed from Jiroch-Saloch.<ref name="Rogue Squadron 21">[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 21|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 21]]</ref> Around nine [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]<ref name="Rogue Squadron Omnibus 3">''[[Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 3]]''</ref> of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> her homeworld was identified on a profile displayed on a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] that was viewed by the [[Rogue Leader/Legends|leader]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], at the time of Huwla's recruitment into the unit.<ref name="Rogue Squadron 21" />

==Inhabitants==
Jiroch-Saloch was colonized by members of the Tunroth species,<ref name="UAA" /> who also colonized the planet's moon.<ref name="XW25" /> They developed a peaceful civilization focused around hunting communities;<ref name="GG12" /> hunters were the most respected in Tunroth society.<ref name="UAA" /> They developed little technology beyond simple animal power prior to joining the Republic and receiving the technology that allowed for Jiroch-Saloch's colonization. Despite subsequently possessing such technology, few Tunroth wandered [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as many had returned to their home system to aid in rebuilding it. The species lived in communes of between roughly 50 and 300 individuals, each led by a tracker.<ref name="GG12" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jiroch-Saloch was introduced via mention in an entry written by [[Craig Robert Carey|C. Robert Carey]] for ''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]'', a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]]. Initially identified as Saloch,<ref name="GG12" /> ''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'', a [[2003]] supplement for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', provided the full name of the planet.<ref name="UAA" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Jiroch system, and therefore Jiroch-Saloch, in grid square K-17.<ref name="TEA" />
